mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates signal deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate earnings visibility and depressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPI) and falling interest rates create a 'stagflation' environment, reducing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for combined CPI/FEDFUNDS signal remains below 0.05 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) in conjunction with declining unemployment (UNRATE) signals a tightening labor market, increasing wage pressures and leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in tightening labor regimes exceed 1.5% in > 40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) indicate robust demand for residential construction, boosting related sectors and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in high HOUST regimes fall below 0.5% in > 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) signals expanding manufacturing activity, increasing corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in high INDPRO regimes remain below 0.8% in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Declining consumer demand (RSAFS) indicates weakening retail spending, reducing corporate revenues and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth (GDPC1) indicates expanding economic activity, boosting corporate profits and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in high GDPC1 regimes fall below 1.2% in > 50% of cases.
